final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] obf_denom,
    input [7:0] numer,
    output reg [7:0] quotient,
    output reg [7:0] remain
);always @(*) begin
        if (obf_denom != 0) begin
            quotient = numer / obf_denom;
            remain = numer % obf_denom;
        end else begin
            quotient = 0;    // Handle division by zero case
            remain = 0;
        end
    end

endmodule
